trust.legalDesc: 设计满足电子签名法的要求

trust.title: 安全性与法律效力，
trust.subtitle: Hundredth Sign以实惠的价格采用业界标准安全技术。

features.sectionSubtitle: Hundredth Sign只包含自由职业者和中小企业真正需要的功能。
features.highlightTitle: 以直观的设计简化合同流程
features.highlightDesc: 上传PDF，拖放签名字段，输入收件人邮箱并发送。无需复杂设置。
features.createDesc: 上传PDF并自由放置签名和文本字段。保存为模板以便重复使用。
features.sendDesc: 只需输入邮箱即可发送签名请求。收件人无需账户。
features.signDesc: 通过输入、手写或图片上传进行签名。自动生成日式圆形和方形印章。
features.stampDesc: 输入姓名即可自动生成圆形和方形印章，适用于日式商务习惯。
features.contactsDesc: 集中管理联系人，并快速选择接收方。
features.complianceDesc: PDF防篡改（扁平化）、时间戳和审计日志确保合规。自动生成完成证书。
features.i18nDesc: 界面和邮件通知支持20种语言。以收件人母语发送签名请求。
features.auditDesc: 记录谁在何时何地签名。自动生成具有法律效力的完成证书。

security.title: 自托管并不意味着降低安全性
security.subtitle: Hundredth Sign 将安全、审计能力和法律证据保留为核心功能。
security.tlsDesc: 对传输和存储数据采用最高级别加密，防止窃听和篡改。
security.tamperDesc: 已签名的PDF经过扁平化处理，防止篡改，技术上保证文档真实性。
security.law: 电子签名法与电子账簿保存法
security.lawDesc: 符合电子签名法和电子账簿保存法的要求，确保签名具有法律效力。
security.globalDesc: 邮件通知和签名界面支持4种语言，跨境合同更顺畅。
security.auditDesc: 记录所有操作的时间戳和IP地址，自动生成完成证书。
security.accessDesc: 为收件人设置访问代码，加强重要合同的身份验证。
security.zeroAIDesc: 您的合同数据绝不会用于 AI 训练。数据所有权始终属于您。
security.bottomNote: 我们削减的是不必要的成本，而非质量。安全是我们绝不妥协的领域。

faq.title: 常见问题
faq.q1: Hundredth Sign的电子签名具有法律效力吗？
faq.a1: Hundredth Sign的设计符合电子签名法和电子账簿保存法的要求。所有签名均自动生成记录签名人、时间和IP地址的完成证书。请注意，法律效力的最终认定取决于具体合同内容和情况，如有需要请咨询法律专业人士。
faq.a2: OSS 版本是单一 workspace 的自托管应用。商业托管功能、plans、quotas 和外部 OAuth 登录已移除，同时保留 PDF 签署、模板、员工账户和审计日志。
faq.a3: 不需要。签名方无需注册账户，只需点击邮件中的链接即可签名。在PC或智能手机上，仅需浏览器即可完成签名。
faq.q4: 外部收件人需要账户吗？
faq.a4: 不需要。员工账户由管理员发放，外部接收方无需账户即可使用。
faq.q5: 可以与非中文合作伙伴使用吗？
faq.a5: 可以。界面支持包括中文和英文在内的多种语言，邮件通知支持4种语言。可以为每位收件人单独设置通知语言，以其母语发送签名请求。
faq.a6: 通信采用TLS 1.3加密，存储数据采用AES-256加密。已签名的PDF经过防篡改处理（扁平化），所有操作均记录在审计日志中。签名人身份验证的访问代码功能作为标准功能提供。

why.badge: 为什么选择自托管 OSS
why.title: 在自己的环境中掌控合同流程。
why.titleSub: 无供应商锁定的自托管电子合同。
why.description: OSS 版本面向希望摆脱供应商锁定和商业托管功能的团队。
why.aiDesc: 使用自己的数据库、存储、邮件设置和管理员账户运行应用。
why.noSalesDesc: Plans、quotas、payment-provider logic 和货币逻辑已从 OSS build 中移除。
why.noPerSeatDesc: 客户可通过邮件链接查看、签署、拒签并下载文档，无需创建账户。
why.passOnDesc: PDF 签署、模板、联系人、内部审批和 WORM 审计日志仍可使用。

overview.title: 1. 概述
overview.body: Hundredth Sign 致力于保护您的隐私。

dataCollected.title: 2. 我们收集的信息
dataCollected.body: 我们收集您直接提供的信息以及使用服务时产生的信息。

purpose.title: 3. 信息使用目的
purpose.body: 我们使用您的信息来提供和改善服务。

thirdParty.title: 4. 第三方服务
thirdParty.body: 运营者可配置可信的第三方服务用于文档存储、邮件发送和基础设施。OSS 发行版默认不需要外部身份提供商。

cookies.title: 5. Cookie
cookies.body: 我们使用必要的 Cookie 进行身份验证和会话管理。

retention.title: 6. 数据保留
retention.body: 只要您的账户处于活动状态，我们就会保留您的数据。

rights.title: 7. 您的权利
rights.body: 您有权访问、更正或删除您的个人数据。

security.title: 8. 安全
security.body: 我们实施行业标准的安全措施。

contact.title: 9. 联系我们
contact.body: 如有隐私相关问题，请发送邮件至 support@hundredthsign.com。

usage.title: Hundredth Sign 完整手册
usage.description: 面向管理员、员工、外部签署人、内部审批人、运维、开发者、外部集成负责人和 AI/CI 操作者的公开手册，覆盖产品边界、日常流程、审计、API、CLI、DB 与 FAQ。

ossNotice.title: OSS 版前提
ossNotice.body: 本手册覆盖 OSS 单工作区版本。不包含商业 SaaS 计费、租户切换或外部客户账号管理。

search.label: 搜索手册
search.empty: 没有匹配章节，请更换关键词。

contactCta.title: 手册无法解决时
contactCta.body: 请提供页面名、操作步骤、发生时间、文档 ID 与错误内容。不要发送密钥或连接字符串。

notFound.title: 未找到章节
notFound.description: 指定的手册章节不存在。
notFound.body: 请从章节列表或搜索中重新选择。

intro.title: 开始与 OSS 产品边界
intro.summary: 说明 OSS 版包含的范围、商业 SaaS 不包含的功能，以及公开页面和登录后页面的边界。

boundary.title: 说明：Product scope
body: 说明：Hundredth Sign is an OSS electronic signature system for the Japanese market. It implements document upload, signature request workflows, internal approvals, audit logs, WORM-style evidence, locale-aware emails, REST API, and a CLI-friendly integration surface.
说明：The OSS edition is a single-workspace product. A single operator organization owns staff, documents, contacts, templates, settings, API keys, and audit records.
说明：Commercial SaaS features such as billing, plan management, tenant switching, multi-customer administration, and external customer accounts are intentionally outside this manual.
bullets: 说明：Use the public routes for signing, document viewing, approvals, legal pages, and this manual.
说明：Use authenticated dashboard routes for daily staff operations.
说明：Use API keys and signctl only for server-side or trusted automation contexts.
说明：Never publish database URLs, API keys, session secrets, SMTP passwords, or storage credentials in tickets or screenshots.
说明：Audit and system audit records are append-only operational evidence.
说明：When behavior and documentation differ, treat the source code and product specification as the correction source and update this manual.
callouts: 说明：This page is public. It lists variable names and procedures, but it must never include real keys, connection strings, or customer data.

publicPrivate.title: 说明：Route groups
body: 说明：Routes are split by who can access them and what security boundary they represent.

public.label: 说明：Public routes
public.detail: 说明：/, /manual, /manual/*, /terms, /privacy, /contact, /sign/:token, /document-view/:token, /approve/:token are reachable without staff login.

authenticated.label: 说明：Authenticated routes
authenticated.detail: 说明：/dashboard and its child routes require staff authentication and are the normal working area for documents, inbox, contacts, templates, and settings.

operator.label: 说明：Operator setup
operator.detail: 说明：/setup is used only when the instance still needs bootstrap or operational setup.

integration.label: 说明：Integration routes
integration.detail: 说明：REST API endpoints and webhooks are not human UI pages; they are authenticated automation surfaces.

usersRoutes.title: 用户、权限与页面
usersRoutes.summary: 说明管理员、成员、签署人、CC、内部审批人和集成客户端的区别。

roles.title: 说明：Role definitions
body: 说明：Each actor has a different security boundary. Do not reuse a staff account or API key for a person or system that should have narrower access.

admin.label: 说明：Administrator
admin.detail: 说明：Manages staff, instance settings, templates, contacts, API keys, and audit review. Admins can perform high-impact configuration changes.

member.label: 说明：Member
member.detail: 说明：Creates documents, sends requests, checks dashboard tasks, manages assigned workflows, and uses contacts/templates according to permissions.

signer.label: 说明：External signer
signer.detail: 说明：Uses a tokenized signing link. Does not need a staff account. May sign, decline, or delegate if the request permits it.

cc.label: 说明：CC recipient
cc.detail: 说明：Receives visibility or completion notifications but is not a required signer unless also configured as a signer.

approver.label: 说明：Internal approver
approver.detail: 说明：Reviews internal approval requests and approves or rejects before the downstream workflow continues.

apiClient.label: 说明：External integration client
apiClient.detail: 说明：Uses API keys with explicit scopes. It is not a human user and all calls must be auditable.

routes.title: 说明：Screen map
body: 说明：Use this map to answer where an operation belongs before changing code or escalating a support request.

public.label: 说明：Public manual/legal/signing
public.detail: 说明：Manual, terms, privacy, contact, signing, document view, and approval token routes are public surfaces.

app.label: 说明：Dashboard
app.detail: 说明：Dashboard, documents, document detail, inbox, contacts, and templates are authenticated staff surfaces.

settings.label: 说明：Settings
settings.detail: 说明：Organization settings, staff, mail, language, API key, and audit-related settings belong to authenticated administrator surfaces.

api.label: 说明：API
api.detail: 说明：REST endpoints are for integrations and CI/AI operators. They require API key authentication and scope checks.

sign.label: 说明：Token pages
sign.detail: 说明：Signing and approval URLs identify the request by token, not by staff session.

setup.title: 初始设置、环境变量与启动条件
setup.summary: 覆盖必需/可选环境变量、启动 migration check、标准命令与密钥处理。

environment.title: 说明：Environment variables
body: 说明：Keep required values in .env or the hosting secret store. Commit only example names and safe defaults.
说明：A production-like instance must have a database URL, session secret, application URL, mail delivery configuration, and storage/proxy settings appropriate to the deployment.

databaseUrl.label: 说明：DATABASE_URL
databaseUrl.detail: 说明：Required. MySQL connection string used by Drizzle migrations and the application server.

sessionSecret.label: 说明：SESSION_SECRET
sessionSecret.detail: 说明：Required in real deployments. Used to protect staff authentication sessions.

appUrl.label: 说明：APP_URL / PUBLIC_APP_URL
appUrl.detail: 说明：Required for links in email, signing URLs, approval URLs, and API/CLI output.

smtp.label: 说明：SMTP_*
smtp.detail: 说明：Required for real email delivery. Local development may use a mail catcher or disabled delivery.

storage.label: 说明：Storage and PDF proxy variables
storage.detail: 说明：Required when uploaded PDFs or signed PDFs are stored outside the local filesystem.

openai.label: 说明：OPENAI_API_KEY
openai.detail: 说明：Optional. Only required for features that call OpenAI APIs. Do not reuse keys from unrelated projects.

env.title: 说明：Example .env names
env.code:
说明：DATABASE_URL=mysql://user:password@host:3306/sign
SESSION_SECRET=replace-with-random-secret
APP_URL=https://example.invalid
SMTP_HOST=smtp.example.invalid
SMTP_PORT=587
SMTP_USER=replace-with-user
SMTP_PASS=replace-with-password
OPENAI_API_KEY=optional-only-when-ai-features-are-enabled

callouts: 说明：Never paste real DATABASE_URL, SMTP_PASS, SESSION_SECRET, or API keys into the manual, screenshots, issue comments, or chat logs.

startup.title: 说明：Startup and migration check
body: 说明：At startup, the server validates whether Drizzle migrations are applied. If migrations are missing or hashes differ, startup can stop before the UI is usable.
steps: 说明：Install dependencies with pnpm through Corepack.
说明：Run migrations with the project-approved command.
说明：Start the dev server and confirm the target port.
说明：Run test and type-check before reporting completion.

commands.title: 说明：Standard commands
commands.code:
说明：corepack pnpm dev
corepack pnpm db:push
corepack pnpm test
corepack pnpm check
corepack pnpm format

authStaff.title: 登录、员工管理与实例设置
authStaff.summary: 说明登录、初始化、员工邀请、角色、语言和实例设置的运维规则。

login.title: 说明：Login and account basics
body: 说明：Staff users sign in before using dashboard functions. Public signers do not need staff accounts.
说明：If login loops, first confirm the app URL, session secret, cookie settings, and whether the browser is using the intended hostname and protocol.
bullets: 说明：Initial setup creates or enables the first administrator.
说明：Forgot-password and reset-password pages handle account recovery.
说明：The authenticated dashboard redirects unauthenticated staff to login.
说明：Do not share staff accounts between people.
说明：Language can be resolved from user preference, request parameter, or browser settings depending on the surface.

staff.title: 说明：Staff and instance settings
body: 说明：Administrators keep the staff list, roles, organization settings, mail settings, and integration settings current.

invite.label: 说明：Invite
invite.detail: 说明：Add only people who should operate the workspace. Use a unique email for each person.

role.label: 说明：Role
role.detail: 说明：Assign the minimum role needed. Administrator privileges should be rare and reviewed.

deactivate.label: 说明：Deactivate
deactivate.detail: 说明：Deactivate users who leave the organization. Do not delete evidence that belongs to completed workflows.

locale.label: 说明：Locale
locale.detail: 说明：Store staff language preference where supported; it is used before browser fallback for staff UI and email.

dashboard.title: 日常操作与 Dashboard
dashboard.summary: 说明日常检查点、文档状态、待办任务和常用操作入口。

daily.title: 说明：Daily operating checklist
body: 说明：The dashboard is the staff starting point for work-in-progress documents and operational alerts.
说明：Use it to find drafts, sent requests, pending approvals, completed documents, and exceptions that need action.
bullets: 说明：Check documents waiting for staff action.
说明：Review signature requests that are sent, viewed, or close to expiry.
说明：Open Inbox for tasks assigned to the current staff user.
说明：Create a new document only after the source PDF is final.
说明：Use templates when the same document structure repeats.
说明：Check audit logs before assuming a workflow step did not happen.
说明：Escalate with document ID and timestamp when support is needed.

status.title: 说明：Document and signature request statuses
body: 说明：Statuses answer what can happen next. They should not be changed casually because API, Inbox, email, and audit behavior depend on them.

draft.label: 说明：draft
draft.detail: 说明：Document exists but has not been sent. Fields and recipients can still be prepared.

sent.label: 说明：sent
sent.detail: 说明：Signature request was sent to the next signer or recipient.

viewed.label: 说明：viewed
viewed.detail: 说明：Signer opened the link. This is evidence that delivery worked, not a signature.

signed.label: 说明：signed
signed.detail: 说明：A signer completed their assigned signing action.

declined.label: 说明：declined
declined.detail: 说明：A signer refused. The workflow should stop or follow the configured exception path.

completed.label: 说明：completed
completed.detail: 说明：All required steps are done and completed PDF/certificate evidence should be available.

expired.label: 说明：expired
expired.detail: 说明：The signing link is no longer valid and the request needs resend or replacement.

documents.title: 文档、PDF 与签名字段
documents.summary: 说明 PDF 上传条件、20MB 限制、验证、字段类型和发送前检查。

pdf.title: 说明：PDF upload and validation
body: 说明：The source file must be a PDF and must pass server-side validation before fields and recipients are finalized.
说明：The current manual policy uses a 20 MB upload limit. Reject files that exceed the limit or fail PDF validation instead of trying to repair them silently.
bullets: 说明：Confirm the PDF is final before uploading.
说明：Do not upload password-protected PDFs unless the implementation explicitly supports them.
说明：Keep page count and file size reasonable for browser signing.
说明：Store the original PDF and generated signed PDF as separate evidence artifacts.
说明：Use PDF proxying for secure viewing instead of exposing raw storage paths.
说明：If validation fails, recreate/export the PDF from the source application.
说明：Do not bypass validation from the UI, API, or CLI.
callouts: 说明：A successful upload is not a completed contract. It only creates the source document for the workflow.

fields.title: 说明：Signature field types
body: 说明：Fields define what a signer must provide and where the result is placed on the PDF.

signature.label: 说明：Signature
signature.detail: 说明：Drawn or typed signature required from a signer.

initial.label: 说明：Initial
initial.detail: 说明：Short confirmation mark used when the document requires initials.

stamp.label: 说明：Stamp
stamp.detail: 说明：Seal/stamp image or equivalent field when business rules require it.

text.label: 说明：Text
text.detail: 说明：Free text input such as company name, title, or address.

date.label: 说明：Date
date.detail: 说明：Date field populated by the signer or system according to workflow rules.

checkbox.label: 说明：Checkbox
checkbox.detail: 说明：Explicit binary confirmation such as consent or acknowledgement.

signing.title: 发送、签署、拒签、委托与最终 PDF
signing.summary: 覆盖顺序签署、访问码、签署链接、拒签、委托、完成证书和 WORM 签署 PDF。

request.title: 说明：Sending and signing flow
body: 说明：A signature request connects one document, recipients, field assignments, delivery email, access control, and audit records.
说明：Sequential signing sends the next action only after the previous required signer completes their step.
bullets: 说明：Set signer order before sending when sequential signing is required.
说明：Use access codes when the recipient identity needs an additional shared secret.
说明：A signing token should be treated as sensitive until the workflow completes or expires.
说明：Signer actions must create audit log entries.
说明：Decline captures the reason and stops or branches the workflow.
说明：Delegation changes who can complete the step and must be recorded.
说明：Completion generates signed PDF evidence and a completion certificate where implemented.
说明：Signed PDFs are WORM-style evidence and must not be overwritten casually.

outcomes.title: 说明：Signer outcomes
body: 说明：Each outcome has a different operational meaning and audit consequence.

signed.label: 说明：Signed
signed.detail: 说明：The signer filled required fields and confirmed. Continue to the next signer or completion.

declined.label: 说明：Declined
declined.detail: 说明：The signer refused. Record the reason and do not treat the document as complete.

delegated.label: 说明：Delegated
delegated.detail: 说明：The signer transferred action to another person where allowed. Record original and delegated recipient.

completedPdf.label: 说明：Completed PDF
completedPdf.detail: 说明：Generated final PDF with signature evidence after all required steps finish.

certificate.label: 说明：Completion certificate
certificate.detail: 说明：Evidence summary such as signer, timestamp, request ID, and audit references.

internalApproval.title: 内部审批
internalApproval.summary: 说明审批状态、同意/拒绝时的行为，以及审批与签名请求的关系。

flow.title: 说明：Approval statuses
body: 说明：Internal approvals are staff workflows that gate or document an internal decision.
说明：Approval and signature workflows are related but separate; rejecting an approval is not the same event as an external signer declining.

draft.label: 说明：draft
draft.detail: 说明：Approval request is being prepared.

approved.label: 说明：approved
approved.detail: 说明：The approver accepted. Downstream work may continue according to workflow rules.

rejected.label: 说明：rejected
rejected.detail: 说明：The approver rejected. Capture reason and stop or return the document to preparation.

cancelled.label: 说明：cancelled
cancelled.detail: 说明：The approval was intentionally stopped by an authorized staff user.

callouts: 说明：Approval decisions must be auditable because they explain why a signature request was sent, stopped, or changed.

actions.title: 说明：Approver actions
bullets: 说明：Open the approval link or Inbox item.
说明：Review the document, request metadata, and business context.
说明：Approve only when the document is ready for the next workflow step.
说明：Reject with a clear reason when correction is required.
说明：Do not use approval comments for secrets.
说明：Confirm the resulting status before escalating a missing task.

inbox.title: 员工 Inbox
inbox.summary: 说明 Inbox 不是邮箱，而是从现有工作流记录生成的虚拟 Inbox。

concept.title: 说明：Virtual Inbox concept
body: 说明：Inbox is not an email inbox and it does not store independent mail messages.
说明：It is a virtual view assembled from existing workflow rows such as signature requests, approvals, delegations, and CC visibility.
说明：Because of this design, fixing Inbox issues usually means checking the underlying workflow row and status, not a separate inbox table.
callouts: 说明：Do not add a second source of truth for Inbox unless the data model and audit rules are deliberately redesigned.

signature.label: 说明：Signature task
signature.detail: 说明：A staff user has a document-related action or follow-up.

approval.label: 说明：Approval task
approval.detail: 说明：An internal approval requires a decision.

delegation.label: 说明：Delegation
delegation.detail: 说明：A delegated signing or review action points to the current user.

cc.label: 说明：CC visibility
cc.detail: 说明：The user is informed about progress without being the required actor.

templates.title: 模板
templates.summary: 说明文档复用、字段摆放、变量以及修改模板时的注意事项。

usage.title: 说明：Template use
body: 说明：Templates reduce repeated setup for common documents by preserving layout, fields, recipient patterns, and message defaults where supported.
说明：Changing a template should not rewrite completed document evidence.
bullets: 说明：Create templates only from reviewed document patterns.
说明：Name templates by business purpose, not by a temporary file name.
说明：Review fields after duplicating a template.
说明：Keep signer roles understandable for staff and API clients.
说明：Retire obsolete templates instead of silently changing history.
说明：Update the manual when template behavior changes.

document.label: 说明：Document variables
document.detail: 说明：Title, document ID, creation time, and request metadata.

recipient.label: 说明：Recipient variables
recipient.detail: 说明：Signer name, email, role, order, locale, and access-code requirement.

sender.label: 说明：Sender variables
sender.detail: 说明：Staff sender, organization, reply-to, and configured branding.

workflow.label: 说明：Workflow variables
workflow.detail: 说明：Due date, reminder policy, approval state, completion links, and audit references.

contacts.title: 联系人、分类与组
contacts.summary: 整理外部收件人管理、分类、组和发送时的收件人选择。

directory.title: 说明：Contact management
body: 说明：Contacts help staff select recurring external recipients consistently.
说明：A contact is not a staff user and does not imply login access.
bullets: 说明：Keep legal names and email addresses accurate.
说明：Use categories for business classification.
说明：Use groups for repeated recipient sets.
说明：Check locale before sending multilingual requests.
说明：Remove or archive obsolete contacts according to policy.
说明：Do not store secrets in contact notes.

contact.label: 说明：Contact
contact.detail: 说明：A reusable external recipient record.

category.label: 说明：Category
category.detail: 说明：Business classification such as customer, vendor, or partner.

group.label: 说明：Group
group.detail: 说明：Reusable set of contacts for repeated sending patterns.

recipient.label: 说明：Recipient
recipient.detail: 说明：A specific person assigned to a specific document workflow.

compliance.title: 审计日志、WORM 与电子账簿合规
compliance.summary: 说明 activityLogs、systemAuditLogs、哈希链、PDF 代理和禁止删除策略。

audit.title: 说明：Audit evidence
body: 说明：Audit data explains who did what, when, from which workflow, and with which result.
说明：WORM design means evidence should be appended and preserved rather than edited or deleted.
bullets: 说明：Record login, document, signature, approval, API, and system-sensitive events.
说明：Use activityLogs for user/workflow activity.
说明：Use systemAuditLogs for system-level and integration-sensitive events.
说明：Hash chains help detect tampering.
说明：PDF proxying prevents accidental exposure of raw storage paths.
说明：Signed PDFs and completion evidence should be treated as immutable.
说明：Deletion policies must preserve required evidence.
说明：If an audit row looks wrong, investigate source logic instead of editing evidence.

worm.title: 说明：WORM and no-delete policy
body: 说明：Compliance behavior is a product boundary. Avoid convenience changes that weaken evidence retention.

systemAuditLogs.label: 说明：systemAuditLogs
systemAuditLogs.detail: 说明：Append-only system, security, integration, and operational records.

pdfProxy.label: 说明：PDF proxy
pdfProxy.detail: 说明：Controlled route for PDF viewing/downloading without exposing storage internals.

hashChain.label: 说明：Hash chain
hashChain.detail: 说明：Links records so later tampering can be detected.

deletePolicy.label: 说明：Delete policy
deletePolicy.detail: 说明：Completed evidence is retained. Deleting business records must not erase required audit evidence.

emailLocales.title: 邮件与语言设置
emailLocales.summary: 说明邮件类型、UI 语言、仅邮件语言、语言优先级和 ?lng 的含义。

mail.title: 说明：Email types
body: 说明：Emails are part of the workflow, not just notifications. Missing email can block signing or approval.

invitation.label: 说明：Staff invitation
invitation.detail: 说明：Sent when a staff account is invited or activated.

signatureRequest.label: 说明：Signature request
signatureRequest.detail: 说明：Sent to external signers with the signing link and optional access-code instructions.

reminder.label: 说明：Reminder
reminder.detail: 说明：Sent when a request is pending and reminder policy requires follow-up.

completion.label: 说明：Completion
completion.detail: 说明：Sent when a workflow completes and evidence is ready.

approval.label: 说明：Approval
approval.detail: 说明：Sent to internal approvers when their decision is required.

locale.title: 说明：Locale priority and ?lng
body: 说明：UI locales are ja, en, th, and zh-CN. Some additional locales may be email-only and should not be added to UI selectors unless the UI is translated.
说明：?lng changes the requested language for public links when supported. It is useful for signing links, approval links, and manual verification.
bullets: 说明：Prefer explicit ?lng when a public link must open in a specific language.
说明：Use staff preference for authenticated staff surfaces.
说明：Use recipient/contact locale for external emails where available.
说明：Fall back to browser or default locale when no stored preference exists.
说明：Do not change email-only locales when updating UI manual content.
callouts: 说明：If raw translation keys appear, compare the manual.* key set across ja, en, th, and zh-CN.

api.title: 外部集成 REST API
api.summary: 说明 API Key 认证、Scope、Endpoint、幂等性、Webhook 与审计记录。

auth.title: 说明：Authentication, scopes, and idempotency
body: 说明：The REST API is for trusted integrations. Authenticate with an API key, validate scope, and write audit records for sensitive actions.
说明：Use an Idempotency-Key header for create operations so retries do not duplicate documents or requests.

token.label: 说明：API key
token.detail: 说明：Send as a bearer token or the project-supported header. Store only in a server-side secret store.

scope.label: 说明：Scope
scope.detail: 说明：Limits what the integration can do, such as document write, request send, or webhook management.

idempotency.label: 说明：Idempotency
idempotency.detail: 说明：Required for safe retries of create/send operations.

audit.label: 说明：Audit
audit.detail: 说明：API actions must record actor, key, scope, target, and result where implemented.

curl.title: 说明：Example request
curl.code:
说明：curl -X POST "$SIGN_API_BASE_URL/api/v1/documents" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SIGN_API_KEY" \
  -H "Idempotency-Key: demo-document-001" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  --data '{"title":"Example contract"}'

createDocument.label: 说明：Create document
createDocument.detail: 说明：Uploads or registers a source document and returns the document identifier.

createRequest.label: 说明：Create/send signature request
createRequest.detail: 说明：Creates recipients, fields, access rules, and sends the workflow when requested.

getStatus.label: 说明：Get status
getStatus.detail: 说明：Returns document/request state for polling or reconciliation.

downloadPdf.label: 说明：Download completed PDF
downloadPdf.detail: 说明：Returns or redirects to controlled completed-PDF access when the workflow is complete.

webhooks.label: 说明：Webhooks
webhooks.detail: 说明：Notify external systems about status changes. Verify signatures and retry safely.

cli.title: signctl CLI 工具
cli.summary: 说明 AI/CI 操作者使用的环境变量、主要命令、输出和幂等性。

environment.title: 说明：CLI environment
body: 说明：signctl is the command-line surface for operators, CI, and AI agents. It should call the public integration boundary instead of writing directly to the database.

baseUrl.label: 说明：SIGN_API_BASE_URL
baseUrl.detail: 说明：Base URL of the target Hundredth Sign instance.

apiKey.label: 说明：SIGN_API_KEY
apiKey.detail: 说明：API key with the minimum required scopes.

idempotency.label: 说明：SIGN_IDEMPOTENCY_PREFIX
idempotency.detail: 说明：Optional prefix to make automated retries traceable.

output.label: 说明：--json
output.detail: 说明：Use machine-readable JSON output for CI/AI automation.

commands.title: 说明：Main commands
body: 说明：Exact command names should follow scripts/signctl.mjs. Keep this manual synchronized when commands change.

examples.title: 说明：Representative commands
examples.code:
说明：node scripts/signctl.mjs documents:create --file ./contract.pdf --title "Contract" --json
node scripts/signctl.mjs requests:send --document-id doc_123 --recipient signer@example.com --json
node scripts/signctl.mjs requests:status --request-id req_123 --json
node scripts/signctl.mjs webhooks:test --url https://example.invalid/webhook --json

callouts: 说明：Do not give signctl a database URL. CLI automation should stay behind the audited REST API boundary.

dataModel.title: DB 表概览
dataModel.summary: 概览关键表、状态流转、代表性唯一约束和禁止删除的数据。

tables.title: 说明：Primary table groups
body: 说明：The actual schema is defined in drizzle/schema.ts. This section is an operator-readable map, not a replacement for migrations.

users.label: 说明：users / staff-related tables
users.detail: 说明：Staff identity, role, status, locale, and login-related data.

documents.label: 说明：documents
documents.detail: 说明：Source document metadata, ownership, status, and file references.

signatureRequests.label: 说明：signatureRequests
signatureRequests.detail: 说明：Sending workflow, status, order, due date, token, and completion state.

signers.label: 说明：signers / recipients
signers.detail: 说明：Recipient identity, order, access-code flags, locale, and signer outcome.

signatureFields.label: 说明：signatureFields
signatureFields.detail: 说明：Field type, page, coordinates, required flag, and assigned signer.

templates.label: 说明：templates
templates.detail: 说明：Reusable document and field definitions.

contacts.label: 说明：contacts / categories / groups
contacts.detail: 说明：External recipient directory and classification.

approvals.label: 说明：internal approvals
approvals.detail: 说明：Internal decision workflow and approver outcome.

audit.label: 说明：activityLogs / systemAuditLogs
audit.detail: 说明：Append-only evidence and security/operational audit trail.

integrations.label: 说明：API keys / webhooks
integrations.detail: 说明：Integration credentials, scopes, webhook subscriptions, and delivery state.

constraints.title: 说明：Constraints and invariants
bullets: 说明：Email-like identifiers must be unique where the schema requires it.
说明：Tokens and API keys must be unique and treated as secrets.
说明：A signature field belongs to one document and usually one assigned signer.
说明：A completed workflow must retain PDF and audit evidence.
说明：Status transitions should be explicit and auditable.
说明：Hash chain inputs must not be rewritten after evidence is recorded.
说明：Schema changes require documentation and tests in the same change set.

operations.title: 运维、故障处理与 FAQ
operations.summary: 减少关于登录、邮件未达、PDF、签署链接、API Key、审计日志、migration 和语言设置的问题。

faq.title: 说明：FAQ by symptom
body: 说明：Start with the symptom, then verify the responsible boundary before changing data.

login.label: 说明：Cannot log in
login.detail: 说明：Check app URL, cookie domain, session secret, account status, password reset flow, and browser hostname.

mail.label: 说明：Email not received
mail.detail: 说明：Check SMTP settings, recipient address, spam folder, mail logs, locale template, and whether delivery is disabled in development.

pdf.label: 说明：PDF upload fails
pdf.detail: 说明：Confirm file type, 20 MB limit, password protection, PDF validation error, and server logs.

signingLink.label: 说明：Signing link does not open
signingLink.detail: 说明：Check token, expiry, request status, access code, route URL, and ?lng parameter.

apiKey.label: 说明：API key fails
apiKey.detail: 说明：Check key value, scope, target base URL, Authorization header, idempotency key, and audit logs.

auditLog.label: 说明：Audit log missing
auditLog.detail: 说明：Check whether the action actually occurred and whether the code path inserts activityLogs or systemAuditLogs.

migration.label: 说明：Migration error
migration.detail: 说明：Check DATABASE_URL, applied migration table, hash mismatch, statement breakpoints, and current schema.

locale.label: 说明：Wrong language
locale.detail: 说明：Check ?lng, staff preference, recipient locale, browser language, and UI vs email-only locale support.

runbook.title: 说明：Operational runbook
steps: 说明：Capture screen, route, document/request ID, user or recipient, timestamp, and exact error.
说明：Check whether the issue is UI, API, email, PDF, DB migration, or audit evidence.
说明：Verify environment variables without exposing their real values.
说明：Run the standard test and type-check commands after code changes.
说明：For DB-backed fixes, apply or hand off the migration before claiming operational completion.
说明：Update the manual and product specification when behavior changes.

verify.title: 说明：Verification commands
verify.code:
说明：corepack pnpm test
corepack pnpm check
node scripts/verify-manual-locales.mjs # if present in your branch

developer.title: 开发者变更规则与验证步骤
developer.summary: 保持规格、DB、审计、翻译、测试和手册同步的变更规则。

rules.title: 说明：Change rules
body: 说明：Treat documentation, migrations, translations, and tests as part of the product surface, not cleanup work.
bullets: 说明：Read docs/architecture.md and the relevant docs/spec file before implementation.
说明：If drizzle/schema.ts changes, update docs/domain/data-model.md.
说明：Never remove INSERT behavior for activityLogs or systemAuditLogs when it protects WORM evidence.
说明：Do not hardcode secrets; read from environment variables.
说明：Keep UI manual keys aligned across ja, en, th, and zh-CN.
说明：Do not edit email-only locales for UI-only manual changes.
说明：Run pnpm test and pnpm check before completion.
说明：When a feature changes public behavior, update this manual in the same branch.

commands.title: 说明：Developer verification
commands.code:
说明：corepack pnpm test
corepack pnpm check
corepack pnpm format

schema.label: 说明：Schema
schema.detail: 说明：Migration created/applied, data model docs updated, no unsafe data loss.

audit.label: 说明：Audit
audit.detail: 说明：Sensitive actions write activityLogs or systemAuditLogs and preserve evidence.

locale.label: 说明：Locale
locale.detail: 说明：No raw manual.* keys in ja/en/th/zh-CN and email-only locales untouched.

manual.label: 说明：Manual
manual.detail: 说明：Manual reflects product-spec.ja.md and any changed behavior.

test.label: 说明：Tests
test.detail: 说明：Relevant unit/integration/E2E checks pass or the blocker is documented.

terms.title: OSS版使用条款
terms.description: 自托管OSS版的运维指引。请对照贵司法务、安全和运维要求进行审查。

scope.title: 指南：Scope and relationship to the license

body.0: 指南：These terms explain recommended operating conditions for the self-hosted OSS edition. They do not replace the repository license, third-party licenses, or a separately signed customization or support agreement.
body.1: 指南：If there is a conflict between these explanatory terms and the actual open-source license file, the license file controls software usage rights.
body.2: 指南：Organizations that operate, modify, redistribute, or provide the system to others must review copyright notices, license notices, trademark use, and any third-party component obligations.

body.0: 指南：The package is distributed as open-source software under the license declared by the repository. The package metadata currently declares MIT, which generally permits use, copy, modification, distribution, sublicensing, and sale if copyright and permission notices are preserved.
body.1: 指南：The OSS edition does not include hosted infrastructure, managed service operation, individual troubleshooting, legal confirmation, security certification, or service-level commitments.
body.2: 指南：Redistributors and operators are responsible for making their own notices, privacy policy, support terms, and commercial terms clear to their users.

body.0: 运营组织负责账号、访问控制、数据库、存储、邮件发送、备份、监控和事件响应。
body.1: 使用真实合同前，请验证恢复流程、邮件到达、域名设置、存储留存和用户权限。
body.2: 管理员账号应限制在确实需要文档访问的人员范围内。
body.3: 指南：The OSS edition is not a tenant-switching SaaS product. It is intended to operate as a single self-hosted workspace.

body.0: 指南：The visible staff roles in the OSS edition are administrator and member. Administrators manage users, instance settings, audit logs, and API integration keys. Members perform daily document, template, contact, inbox, and signing-related work within their permissions.
body.1: 指南：External recipients do not create accounts. They access signing, approval, or document-view pages through token links and any configured access-code or email verification flow.
body.2: 指南：Administrators must deactivate staff accounts that no longer need access and should issue the smallest necessary privileges to each person.

integrations.title: 指南：API, CLI, and webhook use

body.0: 指南：External systems must use the integration API or signctl rather than direct database writes. Direct writes can bypass audit, WORM, PDF completion, status transitions, and email side effects.
body.1: 指南：API keys must be stored as secrets, rotated before expiry, scoped narrowly, and revoked immediately when a system, operator, or AI agent no longer needs access.
body.2: 指南：Webhook receivers must verify the HMAC signature, handle duplicate deliveries, and avoid treating a delivery as the sole source of truth; Sign remains the source of record.

body.0: 运营方控制自托管环境中的个人数据、已签署PDF、访问令牌、审计记录和备份。
body.1: 真实使用前，请定义留存、删除、加密和访问策略。
body.2: 请审查各业务和管辖下的隐私与记录保存义务。
body.3: 指南：If real production data is used for development, support, or customization, mask or minimize it unless there is a documented operational need.

body.0: 电子签名有效性取决于文档、签署人身份流程、管辖、证据策略和运行控制。
body.1: 审计和WORM功能支持证据保存，但不会自动保证法律适用性。
body.2: 生产使用前请咨询法务、税务、安全和合规专家。
body.3: 指南：Consult qualified legal, tax, accounting, security, and compliance professionals before relying on the system for regulated or high-value documents.

body.0: 指南：Do not use the system to impersonate another person, forge consent, bypass required approvals, unlawfully collect personal data, distribute malware, or interfere with third-party systems.
body.1: 指南：Do not disable audit inserts, WORM retention, token validation, access-code checks, or signed-PDF generation in a way that misrepresents evidence.
body.2: 指南：Do not publish API keys, webhook secrets, database URLs, storage credentials, JWT secrets, or private signing certificates.

body.0: OSS版不包含普通产品支持、运维支持、个别调试或服务级别承诺。
body.1: 问题可由运营方内部调查，也可作为单独的付费定制或导入支持咨询。
body.2: 不应期待公开OSS发行版诊断贵司基础设施、邮件系统、法律流程或数据库状态。

body.0: 可另行咨询业务专属定制。
body.1: 典型范围包括文档格式、审批路径、外部集成、语言行为、报表和运营仪表盘。
body.2: 定制不会消除运营方审查并接受最终系统的责任。

body.0: 指南：This manual may be updated as the OSS codebase changes. Operators should keep their deployed version, manual version, migration state, and internal operating procedures aligned.
body.1: 指南：A separately executed written agreement for paid customization or managed support takes precedence for the scope covered by that agreement.
body.2: 指南：The operator should retain a copy of the terms, license notices, and configuration used at the time each production release is adopted.

disclaimer.title: OSS版免责声明
disclaimer.description: 在生产运维或业务专属定制 Hundredth Sign OSS 前请阅读。

body.0: OSS版按现状提供，不担保可用性、特定目的适用性、法律效力、安全性或不间断运行。
body.1: 运营方必须评估系统是否满足技术、运维和法律要求。
body.2: 公开OSS发行版可能变化、存在缺陷，或在生产使用前需要额外审查。
body.3: 指南：The repository license may contain its own warranty and liability wording; read the actual license file before distribution or production use.

body.0: 本手册和软件是技术资料，不是法律、税务、会计或安全建议。
body.1: 电子签名有效性和记录保存的最终决定由运营组织负责。
body.2: 请向相关管辖内合格专家确认要求。
body.3: 指南：Confirm requirements with qualified specialists in the relevant jurisdiction before relying on the system.

compliance.title: 指南：Electronic signature and recordkeeping limitations

body.0: 指南：Electronic signature laws and recordkeeping rules vary by document type, jurisdiction, identity assurance, consent process, retention period, and evidence handling.
body.1: 指南：Audit logs, completion certificates, WORM records, and PDF signatures support evidence, but they do not automatically satisfy every legal, tax, or internal-control requirement.
body.2: 指南：Some documents may require handwritten signatures, qualified signatures, notarization, special storage, additional identity verification, or a different retention workflow.
body.3: 指南：Operators must test whether generated PDFs, logs, timestamps, search fields, and exports remain readable and retrievable for the required period.

body.0: 指南：Self-hosting moves security responsibility to the operator. This includes server hardening, patching, network exposure, secrets management, TLS, authentication, IP restrictions, logging, alerting, and vulnerability response.
body.1: 指南：API keys, webhook secrets, JWT secrets, database credentials, storage credentials, email credentials, and signing certificates must be protected and rotated when risk changes.
body.2: 指南：Backups are useful only if restoration is tested. Monitoring is useful only if someone is responsible for responding.
body.3: 指南：AI or CI automation must use narrowly scoped keys, idempotency keys for retries, and explicit approval boundaries for destructive operations.

body.0: 个人数据、已签署文档、凭证、数据库备份、存储和邮件设置的保护由运营方负责。
body.1: 生产使用前，请测试备份恢复、审计留存、访问限制和事件响应。
body.2: 由运维或定制导致的丢失、泄露、损坏或误投递不属于一般OSS支持范围。
body.3: 指南：Minimize production data in development and support environments, and ensure exports and logs do not expose more information than necessary.

integrations.title: 指南：API, CLI, and webhook risk

body.0: 指南：The integration API and signctl are powerful operational interfaces. A key with send, download, webhook, or API-key management scope can materially affect production workflows.
body.1: 指南：Webhook delivery is best-effort with retries. Receivers must handle duplicates, failures, delayed delivery, signature verification, and reconciliation against the document status API.
body.2: 指南：Direct database writes by external systems are outside the supported integration model and can break audit, WORM, status, and PDF completion behavior.

body.0: 本OSS版包含AI辅助编写的代码。
body.1: AI辅助开发可以降低定制成本，但不意味着无需审查、测试、安全评估或运维验证。
body.2: 认证、签署、审计日志、存储和合规相关修改需要格外谨慎。

body.0: AI辅助开发使贴合各公司业务的后台系统比以往更容易以现实成本构建。
body.1: 付费定制可将OSS版适配到文档、审批、语言、外部集成和内部运营。
body.2: 定制工作应单独确定范围，并包含运营组织的验收测试。

references.title: 指南：Reference information used when drafting this notice

body.0: 指南：This notice reflects public reference themes around electronic signatures, electronic record retention, personal-information governance, security operations, and OSS no-warranty language.
body.1: 指南：Reference materials can change. Operators should review the current official sources that apply to their business before production use.
body.2: 指南：This page is a practical risk notice, not a substitute for the official legal text or professional advice.

ossContact.title: 为贵司业务定制 Hundredth Sign OSS
ossContact.description: OSS版可免费使用。需要贴合自身运营的组织可以咨询付费定制。

body.0: Hundredth Sign OSS 不包含普通OSS使用的一般支持。
body.1: 如果希望系统适配贵司合同、审批路径、内部控制、多语言运营、外部集成或后台工作流，可以咨询付费实施支持。
body.2: 随着AI辅助编码普及，比通用SaaS流程更贴合各公司业务的系统会更加可行。
body.3: 请简要说明希望改善的流程、当前痛点、用户、文档类型和期望时间。

requestItems.1: 需要的自定义页面、字段或外部集成
requestItems.3: 期望上线时间和优先级

ossContact.emailDescription: 请将希望定制的工作流、当前问题和期望时间发送到此邮箱。
